Home.title: Share What You Build.
Home.desc: A modern code snippet manager that helps developers save time, stay organized, and collaborate effortlessly.

ai_document.title: AI Document Snippets
ai_document.desc: Browse AI Document with retrieval assistant

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.sub_title: Login with your Google or Github account

CreateSnippet.title: Create a new snippet
CreateSnippet.sub_title: Create your own code snippet here.

snippet_desc.title: Description
snippet_desc.placeholder: Add a short description for this snippet (optional)

visibility.title: Choose Visibility
visibility.sub_title: Select whether this snippet is visible to others or only to yourself.

public.title: Public
public.sub_title: Visible to everyone, anyone can see this snippet.

private.title: Private
private.sub_title: Only you can see this snippet.

toast.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

visibility.title: Choose Visibility

public.sub_title: Visible to everyone, anyone can see this snippet.

toast.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

delete_dialog.title: Are you sure to delete your snippet?
delete_dialog.sub_title: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your snippet from our servers.

empty_snip.title: No Snippets
empty_snip.desc: You haven't created any code snippets yet. Get started by creating your first snippet.

empty_fav.title: No Favorite Snippets
empty_fav.desc: You haven't added any snippets to your favorites yet. Get started by adding some to your favorites.

snippets.load_error: Failed to load snippets, please try again later.

SnippetTags.title: Tags
SnippetTags.sub_title: Select the tags you want to display on your snippet.

AiDoc.title: AI Content
AiDoc.desc: Mark this snippet as AI Context or Prompt Template.

Profile.load_error: Failed to load profile, please try again later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.profile_desc: This information will be displayed on your public profile page.
profile.username_desc: Your public handle — visible on all your snippets.
profile.bio_placeholder: A short intro — what you build, what you love.
profile.links_desc: Add your website and GitHub so others can find your work.

Category.title: Categories
Category.desc: Discover useful snippets organized by the technologies developers use every day.

AiDocPage.title: AI Document Search Assistant
AiDocPage.desc: Use the Search Assistant to quickly find AI Documents that match your needs.

search.not_found: No matching AI Document found. Please try a different keyword.

chat.title: AI Document Search Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the AI Document Search Assistant. Enter the topic or keywords you'd like to search for, and I'll find the three most relevant snippets for you.
chat.found_results: The following {count} relevant results were found:
chat.no_results: No related AI Document snippets were found. Please try a different keyword.
chat.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
